title: Booster
description: Boost the functionality of Minecraft GUIs
body:
Booster is a sleek, smart, and slightly over-caffeinated [Minecraft](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minecraft) mod that supercharges your user interface without cluttering your screen or your soul.

Carefully crafted with usability in mind, Booster adds a whole bunch of quality-of-life improvements that feel like they should’ve been there all along. From quick inventory tweaks to smart buttons in all the right places, this mod was built to *just work* — and to look good doing it.

Perfect for casual players, hardcore adventurers, redstone engineers, or that one friend who opens ten chests a second looking for a pickaxe.

It’s lightweight, lightning-fast, and integrates smoothly with the game’s existing GUI systems. Oh, and it’s 100% client-side — so no server drama.  

If you like your Minecraft clean, responsive, and just a little bit smarter... Booster’s got your back.




[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/boostermod?color=5da545&label=Modrinth&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/boostermod)  [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/975566?color=F16436&label=CurseForge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/booster)  [![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/boostermod?label=Latest%20Version&color=2ecc71)](https://modrinth.com/mod/boostermod/versions)



## **Current features:**


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- **Last Server** button on Title Screen and Server Selection Screen.
  
- **TP Player** & **MSG Player** buttons to the Social Ineraction Screen.
  
- **Reconnect** button to the disconnected screen.
  
- **Steal** & **Store** buttons, as well as **Search bar**, **Steal/Store Selcted** buttons, **Fill Inventory/Chest Stacks** buttons, **Switch Inventories** button, and **Progressbar** to the Container Screen (Chest, Barrel, etc.).
  
- **Infinite Craft** & **Clear Gird** buttons to the Crafting Table Screen.
  
- **Death location** text, as well as **Copy Death Cords to Clipboard** button, **View Inventory** button, and (only if player has OP permissions) **TP to Death location** button (_Note: this button is still WIP, and may not work 100% properly_), to the Death Screen.
  
- **Drop All** button, as well as **Drop Item Mode** button, **Drop Items** button, **Search bar**, and **Progressbar** for Inventory Screen.
  
- **Save & Quit to world selection** button, as well as **Save & Quit Game** button for Game Menu in Single player.
  
- **Disconnect & Quit to World Selection** button, as well as **Disconnect & Quit Game** button to the Game Menu in Multiplayer.
  
- **Clear** button to the Chat Screen, as well as **Add Cords** button & **X** button
  
- In-game **inventory overlay** that opens when pressing a certain key.
  
- **Open Screenshots Folder** button as well as a **Booster Config** (a shortcut to the **Config Screen**) button to the Options Screen.
  
- **Add All** & **Remove All** buttons to the Resource Pack screen.
  
- **Config Screen** for all of the features above.
  
- **[YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) Config Screen** for all of the features above.
  
- **[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) Config Screen** for all of the features above.
  
- **[MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) Config Screen** for all of the features above.
  
- Even includes an (admittedly outdated but still charming) **How-to-Use** screen.
  
- _And many more features are planned for the future!_

And yes, it’s:

- **Fully client-side** – no server install required.
  
- **Frequently updated** – some days see multiple updates!
  
- Designed to feel like a native part of the game.

Visit the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/boostermod/gallery) to see it all in action.
</details>




## Supported Languages:

<details>
<summary>Click to reveal the list of supported languages</summary>

Booster is designed to be accessible to players all over the world. Here’s a list of languages currently supported:

| Flag | Language Name       | Native Name      | Code    | Completion |
|------|---------------------|------------------|---------|------------|
| 🇺🇸   | English             | English          | en_us   | 100%       |
| 🇪🇸   | Spanish             | Español          | es_es   | 97%        |
| 🇫🇷   | French              | Français         | fr_fr   | 97%        |
| 🇩🇪   | German              | Deutsch          | de_de   | 97%        |
| 🇯🇵   | Japanese            | 日本語            | ja_jp   | 97%        |
| 🇷🇺   | Russian             | Русский          | ru_ru   | 97%        |
| 🇨🇳   | Simplified Chinese  | 简体中文          | zh_cn   | 92%        |
| 🇰🇷   | Korean              | 한국어            | ko_kr   | 97%        |
| 🇸🇦   | Arabic              | العربية           | ar_eg   | 97%        |
| 🇳🇱   | Dutch               | Nederlands       | nl_nl   | 97%        |
| 🇮🇱   | Hebrew              | עברית            | he_il   | 95%        |

If you notice any translation mistakes or want to contribute to the translations, feel free to [reach out](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/booster/comments)!
</details>


## Dependencies:

<details>
<summary>Required</summary>
 
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** – This mod wouldn’t work without the fabric API. It’s the backbone for all of Booster’s features.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Optional</summary>

- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** – For a convenient mod list in the main menu.
  
- **[Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)** – A great way to manage your mod collection directly from the game.
  
- **[YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)** – If you prefer a different config screen layout.
  
- **[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** – Another option for managing Booster’s settings in-game.
  
- **[MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)** – A helpful library to enhance Booster’s configuration options.

Booster runs perfectly well with just [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), but if you want a more customized experience, feel free to try out any of the optional mods listed above!

</details>





## Configuration:

<details>
<summary>Configuration methods</summary>

Booster is all about making your life easier — and that includes how you configure it.

As of version **1.3**, you can choose exactly which UI elements appear in your game. Don’t like a button? Turn it off. Want everything? Go wild. Future versions will give you even more control (seriously, it’s on the to-do list).

### 🛠️ How do I configure Booster?


Simple! There are **three** ways to reach the config screen — choose your favorite adventure:

1. **In-Game Menu**  
   Press `ESC` → `Options` → `Booster Config`  
   (Yes, it’s right there. Super convenient.)

2. **Mod Menu (If installed)**  
   Head to the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Well, menu - find Booster, and click the ✨ `Configure...` ✨ button.

3. **Catalogue (If installed)**  
   Same idea — open the [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) menu, find Booster, and press `Config`.

All of these options will take you to the magical **Config Screen Selection Screen**.  
(Try saying that five times fast. We dare you)

### Choose your flavor of config screen:

-  Booster’s **built-in config screen** (Recommended. Built with love)
  
-  [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
  
-  [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
  
-  [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)

> ⚠️ **Note:** If a button is grayed out or doesn’t work, it means you’re missing the required mod for that screen. Either install it, or use one of the others. No config left behind.

</details>







## Credits

<details>
<summary>Click to reveal credits and acknowledgements</summary>

Big thanks to the following:

- **The Modrinth moderation team** for their incredible support and guidance throughout the development process!
  
- **All the contributors to the translations**, especially those who helped fine-tune the languages and make Booster accessible to more players.
  
- **Mod developers** whose mods and APIs (like [YACL](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander), [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel), and [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen)) were used to enhance Booster’s configurability.
  
- **The Minecraft community** for the continuous feedback and encouragement — it really helps make this mod better!

Without these people and resources, Booster wouldn’t be what it is today. Cheers!
</details>






## Warnings

<details>
<summary>Click to reveal the (not-so-scary) warnings</summary>

- Some of the features are still in **beta**. That means things might break, behave weirdly, or just decide to stop working for no reason. Use with a bit of caution — and maybe a backup or two.

- ~~If you're playing in **windowed mode**, some buttons might overlap or get cozy in awkward places.~~ _([Fixed](https://modrinth.com/mod/boostermod/version/1.3-1.21.x))_

- Most translations were created using AI. While pretty smart, it’s not perfect — so some phrases might sound a bit... robotic. If you spot something strange, feel free to [let me know](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/booster/comments) or send corrections!

</details>


## FAQ:

<details>
<summary>Frequently asked Questions</summary>


### 🔓 Why isn't this mod open source? Hmmm? Are you hiding something?

Nope!  
This mod isn't open source for one simple reason:  
**I'm too lazy to upload it to GitHub.**  
But don’t worry — I usually include a `sources` file with every release I upload.

---

### 📦 Can I include this mod in my modpack?

**Da! Sure!**  
Feel free to add it to your modpack.

---

### 🧭 What versions does the mod support?

Technically:  
- **1.20.1**  
- **1.21** - **1.21.4**

However, the 1.20.1 builds are very old and no longer updated.  
👉 **I recommend using the 1.21.x versions.**

---

### 🔧 Can I release this mod for a newer version or different mod loader?

**Yes**, but with two conditions:
1. The version you're releasing **must not already exist** in the original project.
2. You **must** give credit to the original creator (that's [me](https://modrinth.com/user/XtreaMC)!).

---

### Is this mod compatible with [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)?

Since every feature in this mod can be turned on and off, it is compatible with **any mod**!

---

### 🕹️ How do I use this mod?

Most of the buttons are pretty self-explanatory — plus, the mod is translated into many languages!  
Still confused? Try checking the mod’s built-in **"How to Use"** screen.  
If that doesn't help (and let’s be honest, it probably won’t — it’s very outdated), just [leave a comment](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/booster/comments).  
I'll reply within about **24 hours**.

---

### 🐛 What should I do if I find a bug or issue?

Post a detailed explanation of the problem **[right here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/booster/comments)**, and I’ll fix it **as fast as I can**.

</details>



If you see this, I hope you have a wonderful day.


Did you like this project? Follow it!
